headline: The Doctor Cleared Me for Work but I’m Still in Pain
articleBody: It's a scary moment when the boss says you're fine, but your body says otherwise. You have the right to a second opinion, but the rules are strict. Don't just ignore it or push through the pain; that can ruin your long-term health and your claim. If you're feeling pressured to work through an injury, reach out to Just Work Comp Law. We'll help you protect your rights and your recovery.
